title: Ikigai title + black-bird-flew-in-front-of-me (5:04pm April 5 2022)
html:
TL;DR

  • April 5, 2022 note titled simply "Ikigai" — the Japanese concept of life-purpose-at-the-intersection-of-(love, talent, world-need, paid-for) — but the body of the note is a single timestamped omen: "Saw a black bird fly in front me. 5:04 pm 2002. 5 april. 2022."
  • The juxtaposition is the artifact: title gestures at the systematic life-purpose framework, body records a specific superstitious or omen-flavored moment. Yahir is using the ikigai page-title as the container for a moment that doesn't fit anywhere else.
  • The "2002" in the timestamp is almost certainly an autocorrect / typo for the time, not a year — but it's preserved as-is in the raw note.
  • One of the early specimens of the heightened perception genre — Yahir notices something (a black bird), assigns it weight, files it under a meta-concept (ikigai) without explaining the link.
  • Captured in the same week-window as "Instead of OSIG" (April 12) and 2022 04 15 riley pirate river dream — early-April 2022 was a stretch where Yahir was making big direction-of-life calls and the omens were getting logged.

Key fragment

"Saw a black bird fly in front me. 5:04. Pm 2002. 5april. 2022"

Why it matters

This is one of the cleanest specimens of the omen-and-title mismatch — Yahir naming a note for the framework he wants the moment to live inside, even when the connection isn't explicit. It's a habit worth flagging because it means the title corpus across raw/apple-notes/ contains intent metadata that the body doesn't always honor. Future EXPLORE passes that try to cluster by title alone need to be aware of this.

Open questions

  • What was the omen reading — bad luck (folk belief), good luck, or simply "noticed a thing"?
  • Did Yahir actually engage the ikigai framework elsewhere in the corpus, or is this the only mention? (If only mention, ikigai is a single-use container, not a recurring theme.)
  • The "5:04 pm" — was Yahir walking somewhere specific in Corvallis?

Wikilinks

ikigai · heightened perception trigger · 2022 04 12 instead of osig · 2022 04 15 riley pirate river dream · osu · corvallis or · stray dog and lightning bolt
